content: The structured iterative self-feedback loop of the Self-Refine framework for code and output improvement can be augmented by multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to resolve the blind spot problem where single-perspective self-feedback cannot catch hidden flaws in an LLM's output. This creates a hybrid refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data while addressing its inherent limitation of self-feedback bias.
